document_api_meta.title: Update Tracking
document_api_meta.env_desc: This API manages carton-level tracking information for inbound orders. It utilizes upsert logic to create new tracking records or overwrite existing entries as required. Only orders which are shipped but have not yet been marked as "Delivered" or "Received" yet can be updated, with a 5-time edit limit per carton.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_body_param.name: order_id
request_body_param.desc:
The numeric identifier of the inbound order to update tracking information for.  
**Note:** Provide the numeric sequence only; do not include the "IBR" prefix (e.g., use `123456` instead of `IBR123456`).

request_body_param.name: ^provider_name
request_body_param.desc:
The `provider_name` field must contain exactly one of the following strings.

* `FEDEX` (Federal Express)
* `UPS` (United Parcel Service)
* `DHL` (DHL Express)
* `USPS` (United States Postal Service)
* `OTHER` (All other logistics providers)

**Note:** Input must match the uppercase string exactly (e.g., `"provider_name": "FEDEX"`).

request_body_param.name: ^tracking_number
request_body_param.desc: The tracking number to be associated with this carton.

request_body_param.name: ^carton_number
request_body_param.desc: The carton number from inbound order to be associated with this tracking number.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.
Request or request parameters are empty. Please recheck the input parameters.
Access denied. The API requires the seller to be bound to exactly one merchant.
No inbound orders found for the merchant.
Parcel tracking info list is empty.
Tracking provider is invalid or unsupported.
Carton number is invalid or missing.

Failed to update tracking info for inbound order. Please check that the inbound order is in "Shipped" status and try again. If the issue persists and the cause is unknown, please contact platform support.
Tracking number is invalid or missing.

scope_list.package_description: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
scope_list.auth_info: You can push and manage your order information to the FBT System. FBT will fulfill your orders on your behalf and notify you in a timely manner if any anomalies occur with the orders.
